title: Trump Says U.S. Has ‘Nothing to Do’ With Ukraine War at G7 Summit
summary_full: President Trump’s remarks underscored a new security reality for U.S. allies in Europe, who for eight decades relied on American protection.
summary_public: President Trump’s remarks underscored a new security reality for U.S. allies in Europe, who for eight decades relied on American protection.
